title: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) - NHS
text:
r atrophy (SMA), your care team will pass information on to the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service (NCARDRS) .
This helps scientists look for better ways to prevent and treat this condition. You can opt out of the register at any time.
